title: 5 Processing ICBC AgentsГўВҖВҷ Deposits
body_text:
5	Processing ICBC AgentsГўВҖВҷ Deposits
5.1	Overview of Processing an ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs Deposits
Your financial institution processes deposits made by ICBC agents to the appropriate ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs account held at your financial institution.
Report the total value of cash and/or cheques received to Central 1 using the ICBC Deposit Slip in ServiceNow. You must submit the ICBC Deposit Slip the same day you receive a deposit.
Central 1 uses the information to sweep the ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs account held at your financial institution and aggregates the deposits to credit ICBC. Specifically, CentralВ 1 issues a pre-authorized debit (PAD) against each ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs account and sends a credit to ICBCГўВҖВҷs account at Royal Bank. The ICBC agent advises ICBC of all payments it deposits to the ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs account.
5.2	Verifying and Processing an ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs Deposits
Verify and process an ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs account deposits as follows:
Verify the total of value cash and cheques to the totals on the ICBC Deposit Slip, Form 1126, for each deposit. See Figure 1. See Section 4.1, Preparing an ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs Deposit, for procedures on completing the form.
Ensure that all cheques are acceptable for deposit (e.g., verify the date, itemГўВҖВҷs MICR, signature). See the Deposit Processing Part for more information.
Ensure that all cheques are endorsed in the upper right quadrant of the back of each item with an ICBC Endorsement stamp. The stamp provides the agentГўВҖВҷs ICBC number and space for the agent to record the insured individualГўВҖВҷs driverГўВҖВҷs license number, phone number, claim number, vehicle number, and customer service number. See Figure 1.
Important
: 	If the ICBC endorsement stamp is missing, contact the ICBC agent immediately. Hold the entire deposit until the ICBC agent comes to the branch and stamps the back of the cheque.
Figure 1: ICBC Endorsement Stamp
Note:	Newer ICBC Endorsement Stamps donГўВҖВҷt contain the ICBC return transit (09150-003), however dishonoured cheques must still be returned to Royal Bank.
Credit the total value of cash and/or cheques to the appropriate ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs account. Follow your internal policies and procedures. The total amount on the ICBC Deposit Slip, Form 1126, should always correspond to the total amount credited to the ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs account. If multiple deposit slips are received from an ICBC agent, post the deposit slip totals to the account separately.
Initial the deposit slip and provide a copy to the depositor.
Prepare and process the cheques as a separate deposit in Branch Capture. See the Deposit Processing Part for procedures on creating deposits in Branch Capture. Ensure that you complete the following:
ГўВҲВ’
Record ГўВҖВңICBC AgentГўВҖВқ in one of the Deposit Reference fields when creating the deposit in Branch Capture.
ГўВҲВ’
Enter the RBC transit number (09150-003) in the Deposit Transit and Deposit Route fields for each ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs deposit item in Branch Capture. This is important because dishonoured ICBC Agent Account deposit items must be returned to RBC for processing. See the Deposit Processing Part for procedures on entering return information.
Note:	Failure to enter the correct return transit will result in the items being returned to your financial institution. See Section 6.3, Managing Chargebacks for an ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs Account, for more information.
Retain copies of the following documents for your records per your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs policy: ICBC Deposit Slip, Form 1126, and itemized tape listings of cheque bundles.
Submit an ICBC Deposit Slip in ServiceNow. See Section 5.3, Submitting an ICBC Deposit Slip in ServiceNow, for procedures.
5.3	Submitting an ICBC Deposit Slip in ServiceNow
Use ServiceNow to submit an ICBC Deposit Slip on the date you receive the deposit. Failure to do so will prevent Central 1 from issuing a PAD to debit the ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs account and from crediting ICBC. If ICBCГўВҖВҷs Royal Bank account is not credited, ICBC will initiate a trace request.
Note:	If you donГўВҖВҷt have access to ServiceNow, contact your User Management Security Officer to request access.
Submit an ICBC Deposit Slip on ServiceNow as follows:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 2.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 2: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 4.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 4: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: ServiceNow ГўВҖВ“ Accessing the Service Catalogue
Select
ICBC Deposit Slip
in the Paper Payments category. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: ICBC Deposit Slip Request
Complete the ICBC Deposit Slip as follows. See Figure 7. Your financial institution representativeГўВҖВҷs name pre-populates.
ГўВ‘
Select the ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs number from the drop-down list.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Enter the deposit amount.
ГўВ‘Вў
Select the plus sign (+) to add a new row and include an additional deposit.
Note: 	Select the (
ГўВЁВҜ
) sign to delete a row.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Select the paper clip icon to attach items (if applicable).
ГўВ‘ВҘ
Select
Submit
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Alternatively, select the trash can to delete all data and start over.
Figure 7: ICBC Deposit Slip Example
Record the ServiceNow ticket number on the ICBC Account Deposit Slip, Form 6334.
END
